proposal1.heroHeadline: Cloudstep is losing 1,200 hours annually on manual proposal drafting. Here's the breakdown.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Drafting proposals manually consumes hours. Our system delivers in 47 seconds, tailored to your services.
proposal1.problemsIntro: Every moment spent manually creating proposals is a drain on Cloudstep's resources.

problems.title: Time Drain
problems.description: Spending 20 hours a week on proposals translates to 1,040 hours a year. That's over a month of lost productivity.

problems.title: Revenue Leakage
problems.description: Each missed opportunity due to slow proposal turnaround can cost Cloudstep an average of $5,000 in potential revenue.

problems.title: Brand Inconsistency
problems.description: Manually crafted proposals risk deviating from Cloudstep's brand. Inconsistencies can lead to a 15% decrease in client trust.

problems.title: Increased Labor Costs
problems.description: Paying staff to manually draft proposals at $30/hour results in $36,000 spent annually just on drafting.

problems.title: Lost Deals
problems.description: Delayed responses mean lost deals. Each day a proposal is late can decrease the close rate by 10%.

problems.title: Error Prone
problems.description: Manual entries lead to errors. Each error can cost $1,000 in corrections and potential loss of client trust.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our AI system solves these issues by automating and optimizing proposal creation.

solutions.title: Rapid Proposal Generation
solutions.description: Currently, proposals take hours to draft manually. Our system creates them in under 60 seconds.

solutions.title: Brand Consistency
solutions.description: Manual proposals risk off-brand content. Our AI ensures brand alignment every time.

solutions.title: Cost Reduction
solutions.description: Labor costs skyrocket with manual drafting. Automation slashes these costs significantly.

solutions.title: Error Minimization
solutions.description: Manual processes are prone to mistakes. Our system reduces errors through precision automation.

solutions.title: Opportunity Maximization
solutions.description: Delayed proposals mean missed opportunities. Our system ensures timely delivery to capture every deal.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Cloudstep's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Cloudstep around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Cloudstep.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Transform Acme Corp's Revenue Through Proven Digital Strategies.
proposal2.heroSubheadline: Partner with Cloudstep for a targeted digital transformation plan that maximizes revenue and engagement.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Acme Corp is currently experiencing significant revenue losses due to inefficient digital strategies.

problems.title: Low Conversion Rates
problems.description: Each visitor who leaves without converting represents potential revenue lost. Acme Corp's current conversion rate is 2%, below the industry average of 5%.

problems.title: High Bounce Rate
problems.description: A 70% bounce rate results in lost engagement opportunities. This is 20% higher than acceptable benchmarks, costing Acme Corp valuable interactions.

problems.title: Ineffective Social Media
problems.description: With a 0.5% engagement rate, Acme Corp is missing out on potential leads. Industry standards suggest a minimum 1.5% rate for effective outreach.

problems.title: Poor SEO Performance
problems.description: Ranking below competitors for key terms means missed visibility. Each lower rank position costs Acme Corp an estimated 10% potential traffic.

problems.title: Weak Mobile Experience
problems.description: Mobile users account for 60% of traffic, yet they convert 50% less than desktop users due to a suboptimal mobile experience.

problems.title: Underperforming Email Campaigns
problems.description: With an open rate of only 10%, Acme Corp is missing out on re-engaging 90% of its existing customer base.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Cloudstep's tailored solutions directly address these critical issues, turning losses into growth.

solutions.title: Conversion Optimization
solutions.description: Increase conversion rates by refining user journeys and A/B testing. This will directly enhance revenue per visitor.

solutions.title: SEO Enhancement
solutions.description: Improve search rankings through targeted keyword strategies, driving more organic traffic to Acme Corp's site.

solutions.title: Mobile Experience Design
solutions.description: Revamp mobile interfaces to ensure seamless navigation and engagement, increasing mobile conversion rates.

solutions.title: Email Campaign Revitalization
solutions.description: Redesign email strategies to boost open and click-through rates, driving greater engagement and sales.

proposal2.whyUsIntro: Cloudstep is uniquely positioned to elevate Acme Corp with our proven expertise and client-focused approach.

whyUsCards.title: Tailored Solutions
whyUsCards.description: We craft custom strategies that fit your specific needs, ensuring optimal outcomes.

whyUsCards.title: Data-Driven Results
whyUsCards.description: Our decisions are backed by data to guarantee measurable improvements.

whyUsCards.title: Collaborative Partnership
whyUsCards.description: We work closely with your team to ensure alignment and success throughout the project.

whyUsCards.title: Proven Track Record
whyUsCards.description: Our clients consistently see enhanced performance and growth as a result of our strategies.

proposal2.teamIntro: Meet the team that will be guiding Acme Corp's success.

team.name: there
team.bio: Leading strategy and client relationships with over 15 years of industry experience. Committed to delivering results and fostering strong partnerships.

proposal2.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Discovery & Planning
process.description: We start by understanding your business, goals, and current challenges.

process.title: Strategy Development
process.description: Crafting a tailored strategy based on insights gathered in the discovery phase.

process.title: Implementation
process.description: Executing the strategy with precision and ongoing optimization.

process.title: Review & Optimize
process.description: Assessing results and refining strategies for continued success.

proposal2.pricingIntro: Consider these investment options for Acme Corp's growth.

pricing.name: Essential Package
pricing.description: Basic strategy and support for foundational improvements.

pricing.name: Growth Package
pricing.description: Comprehensive strategy with a focus on growth and optimization.

pricing.name: Premium Package
pricing.description: Full-service package for maximum impact and rapid growth.
